evidence: TMN profile exposes role/tool family names including CMPLX-Mirror, CMPLX-TMN2, CMPLX-Forge, CMPLX-Intake, CMPLX-Weaver, CMPLX-Librarian, CMPLX-Alchemist, CMPLX-Archivist, CMPLX-Cartographer, CMPLX-Compass, CMPLX-Crucible, CMPLX-Herald, CMPLX-Navigator, and CMPLX-Sentinel.
TMN/TMN1 profile carries API, Docker, receipt, lattice, compose, formal, forge, and MCP signals.
Kernel repo_forms has curated forms for both TMN roots.
promotion_rule: Promote the role taxonomy as a tool-family index first. Runtime code promotion waits for per-role source review.
